title: Levi Ashford
content:
Levi Ashford (born in the late 1950s) is a former professional basketball player best known as captain of the Port Helix Navigators when they won the coastal league championship in 1904.

Career statistics.

Across eleven professional seasons, Levi Ashford recorded 14,200 points and 3,100 assists. His efficiency rating peaked during the 1904 playoffs.
